---
title: "Assignment 3"
description: "Assignment 3 uploaded to website"
author: 
  - name: Divad Chaudhary
  - affiliation: Department of Economics, University of Winnipeg
categories: [Quarto, R, Data Analysis]
citation: 
  url: https://github.com/divad119/Divad-Chaudhary-Website-4-/tree/main/Blog/Assignment%201
draft: false
format: html
---

click [here](assignment_3.pdf)
